basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University Research Assistant and Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 04 June 2026 on the official website of the university. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Allahabad University Research Assistant and Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduation in Sanskrit with 55%, Graduation with 55%
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduation in Sanskrit with 55%. Preference: 1. NET/M.Phil/Ph.d 2. Knowledge of Sanskrit typing is essential. Field Investigator: Graduation with 55%. Preference: Knowledge of typing is essential.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37000/- per month (Research Assistant), Rs. 20000/- per month (Field Investigator)
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 37000/- per month Field Investigator: Rs. 20000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Allahabad University Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Allahabad University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Allahabad University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form for Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 is 10-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the posts of Research Assistant and Field Investigator in Allahabad University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant post, candidates must have a Postgraduation in Sanskrit with 55%. Preference will be given to those with NET/M.Phil/Ph.d and knowledge of Sanskrit typing.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Investigator post will receive a salary of Rs. 20000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for Allahabad University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Allahabad University. The link will be provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211002.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age limits and any applicable age relaxations.
